description_long: This is a classic high-top sneaker with a predominantly black canvas upper and a white rubber sole. The shoe features metal eyelets for lacing and a white toe cap, characteristic of iconic streetwear sneakers. On the inner side, there is a circular patch with a star emblem, suggesting a design inspired by Converse Chuck Taylor All Stars. The laces are black and threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern through the eyelets. The sole is thick and flat, providing both comfort and durability for urban walking. The overall appearance is clean, structured, and suitable for casual or sporty urban environments.
description: A black high-top sneaker with a white rubber sole, metal eyelets, and a circular star patch on the side. The shoe is clean, structured, and designed for urban wear.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the black tongue, laces, and the white toe cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black canvas, metal eyelets, and the absence of a logo patch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white heel strip and the back of the sole.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the circular star patch and the full profile of the shoe.
attribute_logo: Circular star patch on the inner side, white with a black star and text.
